a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: The alcohol-attributable fraction (AAF) denotes the proportion of a health outcome which is caused by alcohol
(i.e. that proportion which would disappear if alcohol consumption was removed). Alcohol consumption has a
causal impact on more than 200 health conditions (diseases and injuries).
Data source: World Health Organization - Global Health Observatory (2025)
